title: Apply clear over base two-pack refinishing materials to vehicle body components
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply clear over base two-pack refinishing materials to vehicle body components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.3 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.3 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.3 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Mix COB two-pack refinishing materials

pcs.text: Calculate COB two-pack refinishing materials according to paint manufacturer specifications, formulas and codes2.2 Record codes and information relevant to job requirement 2.3 Mix materials according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate COB two-pack refinishing materials according to paint manufacturer specifications, formulas and codes2.2 Record codes and information relevant to job requirement 2.3 Mix materials according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate COB two-pack refinishing materials according to paint manufacturer specifications, formulas and codes2.2 Record codes and information relevant to job requirement 2.3 Mix materials according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Mix COB two-pack refinishing materials

elements.title: Apply COB two-pack refinishing material

pcs.text: Apply refinishing materials using manufacturer recommended method and intervals, and according to workplace procedures3.2 Dry refinishing materials and equipment according to workplace procedures and ensure painted surface meets specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply refinishing materials using manufacturer recommended method and intervals, and according to workplace procedures3.2 Dry refinishing materials and equipment according to workplace procedures and ensure painted surface meets specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply refinishing materials using manufacturer recommended method and intervals, and according to workplace procedures3.2 Dry refinishing materials and equipment according to workplace procedures and ensure painted surface meets specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Apply COB two-pack refinishing material

elements.title: Rectify paint faults

pcs.text: Identify paint faults according to industry and workplace procedures4.2 Select rectification procedures according to fault or damage type4.3 Identify required materials to rectify paintwork from paint manufacturer information4.4 Rectify paint surface faults using compounds, polishes and glazes to blend rectified areas with existing paintwork
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify paint faults according to industry and workplace procedures4.2 Select rectification procedures according to fault or damage type4.3 Identify required materials to rectify paintwork from paint manufacturer information4.4 Rectify paint surface faults using compounds, polishes and glazes to blend rectified areas with existing paintwork?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify paint faults according to industry and workplace procedures4.2 Select rectification procedures according to fault or damage type4.3 Identify required materials to rectify paintwork from paint manufacturer information4.4 Rectify paint surface faults using compounds, polishes and glazes to blend rectified areas with existing paintwork.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Rectify paint faults

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Complete work processes
